sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me look at the left panel's ASCII to find the small dark gray object
current_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Left panel area (rows 5-15, cols 10-20):")
for r in range(5, 16):
    print(f"  Row {r}: {current_ascii[r][10:21]}")

# Also check all nodes in the left panel
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("\nAll nodes in left panel (col < 32, row < 32):")
for node in nodes:
    if node['boundary']:
        rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
        min_r, max_r = min(rows), max(rows)
        min_c, max_c = min(cols), max(cols)
        if max_r < 32 and max_c < 32:
            print(f"  Node {node['id']}: color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, bbox=({min_r},{min_c})-({max_r},{max_c}), children={node['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
